title: October 2
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|October}}

'''October 2''' is the 275th day (276th in leap years) of the year, with 90 days remaining.</noinclude>

*[[1940s#1944|1944]] – [[Larry Ward]] is born.
*[[1960s#1960|1960]] – [[Barbara Kesel]] is born.
*[[1960s#1962|1962]] – [[Jeff Bennett]] is born.
*[[1960s#1964|1964]] – [[Elizabeth Wein]] is born.
*[[1960s#1969|1969]] – [[Natasha Little]] is born.
*[[1972]] – [[Matt Bouchard]] is born.
*[[1982]] – [[Amanda Hale]] is born.
*[[1991]] – [[Antony Del Rio]] is born.
*[[1996]] – ''[[X-Wing: The Krytos Trap]]'' published.
*[[2001]] – [[Star Wars Insider 56|''Star Wars Insider'' 56]] published.
*[[2002]] – [[Empire 2|''Empire'' 2]] published.
*2002 – ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File 40]] published.
*[[2005]] – [[Hamilton Camp]] dies.
*[[2008]] – ''[[The Clone Wars: Decide Your Destiny: The Way of the Jedi]]'' published.
*2008 – ''[[The Clone Wars: Prelude]]'' webcomic, first instalment in The Clone Wars webcomic series, posted on [[StarWars.com]].
*2008 – ''[[The Clone Wars: Shakedown]]'' webcomic published online.
*2008 – ''[[HoloNet News — A Galaxy Divided]]'' podcast released online.
*[[2009]] – [[Star Wars: The Clone Wars|''The Clone Wars'']]: [[The Clone Wars: Season Two|Season Two]] premieres with "[[Holocron Heist]]" and "[[Cargo of Doom]]" on [[Cartoon Network]].
*[[2012]] – ''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' published.
*[[2015]] – ''[[The Star Wars Trilogy]]'' reprinted as part of the [[Barnes & Noble Collectible Editions]] series.
*[[2017]] – "[[Tracker Trouble]]" airs on YouTube.
*[[2018]] – ''[[Galactic Adventures Storybook Collection]]'' published.
*2018 – ''[[Star Wars Legends Epic Collection: The Menace Revealed Vol. 1]]'' published.
*2018 – ''[[Star Wars: Search Your Feelings]]'' published.
*2018 – ''[[Lando's Luck]]'' published
*2018 – ''[[Choose Your Destiny: A Luke & Leia Adventure]]'' published.
*2018 – ''[[Star Wars: Be More Vader]]'' published.
*2018 – ''[[Star Wars: Be More Yoda]]'' published.
*[[2019]] – [[Doctor Aphra (2016) 37|''Doctor Aphra'' (2016) 37]] published.
*2019 – [[Star Wars Adventures: Return to Vader's Castle 1|''Star Wars Adventures: Return to Vader's Castle'' 1]] published.
*2019 – [[Star Wars (2015) 72|''Star Wars'' (2015) 72]] published.
*[[2020]] – ''[[Star Wars: Squadrons]]'' released.
*[[2024]] – [[Battle of Jakku — Insurgency Rising 1|''Battle of Jakku — Insurgency Rising'' 1]] published.
*2024 – [[Inquisitors 4|''Inquisitors'' 4]] published.
